description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a predominantly white exterior and bold red accents on the entryway, balconies, and roof details. The structure is two stories tall, with large, blue-tinted windows spanning the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade is symmetrical, with a recessed central entryway and a wide, open balcony above. The roof is flat, with several raised sections and small red square details, contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The side views reveal deep balconies and open spaces, emphasizing horizontal lines and geometric simplicity. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, red accents, and large blue-tinted windows, featuring open balconies and a recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing a symmetrical facade, recessed red entryway, and small red roof details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the deep balconies, blue-tinted windows, and open spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view with two wide balconies, large blue windows, and a central open section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the balcony depth and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entryway with red flooring, no visible steps, and a minimalist, open design
